text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Strong tech/chip investment news (Apple, OpenAI, SambaNova) provides a tailwind, but Trump's escalating geopolitical rhetoric and rising oil prices introduce significant market uncertainty and potential volatility.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.06%) and SPAL (-23.1%) are deep in the red and leveraged; margin amplifies these drops. SPAL is a new, very volatile leveraged ETF. QQQI (-2.16%) is near its stop.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments and how they impact broader market sentiment, especially for your leveraged positions.

Bottom line: Tight risk management on leveraged holdings is paramount while selectively looking for opportunities in core tech/chip names.
plays: Re-evaluate stops on SOXL and SPAL. These leveraged ETFs are decaying and deep in the red; margin amplifies risk.
Watch QQQI closely; if it hits 52, trim the position as scanner suggests.
Consider AMAT (entry 547.11-545.21, stop 541.98) for a new buy, given Apple's chip commitment and its scanner setup.
